series_metadata.series_description: Investigative materials collected or created during the course of a Special Investigations Department investigation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Once image is scanned into UDS and verified, then destroy. If not scanned into UDS, Retain 10 years after the allegation rejected date or case closed date, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain 10 years after the allegation rejected date or case closed date, then destroy. ; Microform: Retain 10 years after the allegation rejected date or case closed date, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete ; Microform: Burn
